name_en: 🔥New Paseo Chain Style Small Dumpling Bag🔥 Imported Nappa leather creates a lazy yet high-class vibe💥 Exquisite craftsmanship, simple and elegant silhouette🌹 Beauty and utility combined, can be carried by hand, over shoulder, or crossbody, capacity is also great🌷 Suitable for French elegance, modern style, and sweet cool style alike. The handle goes through the body, bringing a unique soft and ultra-light pleated structure💄 "Paseo" is the new form of the L0💋ewe dumpling bag! This bag, which appears most often on the runway, is named "Paseo" 👜 Meaning "stroll" in Spanish, it has a casual yet playful style💄 The bag features a streamlined look, shaped like a dumpling⭐️ The handle is a drawstring design, with knotted buckle elements on both sides continuing the Flamenco series, top zipper closure, and reinforced with circular stitching at the bottom🌞 Simple yet full of details, overall atmospheric and soft🎁 Size: 35~21~11.5CM
